LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIGUEL RODRIGUEZ'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED EXCLUDING RECOVERY OF ANY OF THE COSTS CLAIMED IN HIS COSTS MEMORANDUM. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MR. RODRIGUEZ HAS WITHDRAWN HIS REQUEST FOR THE COSTS CLAIMED IN HIS COSTS MEMORANDUM. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiffs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment And For Costs
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MIGUEL RODRIGUEZ's Plaintiffs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And To Enter Judgment And For Costs.

Plaintiff Miguel Rodriguez's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted excluding recovery of any of the costs claimed in his costs memorandum. No opposition filed. Mr. Rodriguez has withdrawn his request for the costs claimed in his costs memorandum.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
